---
id: reopen-identity
title: "Reopen a CLOSED identity's account."
description: "Transitions CLOSED -> ACTIVE against the same identity ID, without re-running full provisioning. Fails if the identity is not currently CLOSED."
sidebar_label: "Reopen a CLOSED identity's account."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/kobo-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Reopen a CLOSED identity's account."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/identities/{identityId}/reopen"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Transitions CLOSED -&gt; ACTIVE against the same identity ID, without re-running full provisioning. Fails if the identity is not currently CLOSED.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
